expectations.text: Gate B fired: asked for the actual page (paste copy / URL / screenshot) plus goal and audience BEFORE auditing
expectations.evidence: The response requests the page copy, the desired visitor action, and traffic source before providing any audit findings.

expectations.text: Did NOT invent the page's contents and audit its own invention
expectations.evidence: No invented page content appears — the entire response is a request for information with a promise to audit the real page.

expectations.text: May offer a clearly-labeled generic checklist as a fallback
expectations.evidence: The response offers 'a general checklist to self-audit against in the meantime' if the copy cannot be shared yet.
